name: manual_5d3588
claim: For Tempire 80% Shift layout, prefer lightweight UI patterns (Popover dropdowns, inline modals) over heavy full-screen overlays (Sheet, side drawers). A full-width Sheet feels too heavy on a centered max-w-7xl layout and blocks content unnecessarily.

decisions.notes: Victor rejected the Sheet-based CartDrawer because it felt too heavy for the 80% Shift centered layout. Replaced with a Popover-based CartDropdown that hangs from the icon without blocking the page.

rationale: Victor rejected the Sheet-based CartDrawer because it felt too heavy for the 80% Shift centered layout. Replaced with a Popover-based CartDropdown that hangs from the icon without blocking the page.
